tips.title: Frame search intent before you type
tips.summary: Decide whether you want a fact, a document, or a person before searching to pick better keywords.

tips.title: Use operators to narrow noisy results
tips.summary: Combine source, owner, and date filters to cut a broad result set down to the few documents that matter.

tips.title: Call the search API with a typed client
tips.summary: Wrap the Glean search endpoint in a small typed client so query options stay consistent across your app.
